entity.summary: Netherlands-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange that began operating in 2019 and completed an orderly shutdown in September 2023. Txbit announced on 2023-08-14 that tightening regulation, legal uncertainty, rising compliance costs, and pressure on product margins made continued operation untenable. Trading was disabled on the announcement date, while withdrawals remained available until the final closure deadline on 2023-09-14.
entity.notes: Launch date is normalized to 2019-01-01 because contemporaneous launch-period sources establish operation in 2019 but do not provide a sufficiently authoritative exact opening day. death_reason is voluntary_shutdown because the operator published an orderly wind-down plan; regulatory and market pressures were stated causes rather than a direct government closure order.

events.title: Txbit began operating as a Netherlands-based exchange
events.description: Contemporaneous 2019 sources describe Txbit.io as a newly established Netherlands-based cryptocurrency exchange operated through the Txbit brand.
events.notes: Year-level launch marker normalized to the first day of 2019.

events.title: Txbit announced closure and disabled trading
events.description: Txbit announced that all services would end on 2023-09-14. The operator cited adverse market shifts, tighter regulation, legal uncertainty, rising compliance costs, and margin pressure. Open orders were canceled and trading was disabled on the announcement date, while withdrawals were restored for the wind-down period.
events.notes: The official announcement provides both the rationale and staged customer wind-down procedure.

events.title: Txbit reached its final service and withdrawal deadline
events.description: Txbit's official shutdown schedule kept the website and withdrawal service available until 12:00 UTC on 2023-09-14. The operator warned that funds left after that deadline would no longer be retrievable, making it the terminal operational marker.
events.notes: Used as the final closure date because the operator explicitly identified this deadline as the end of accessible services.

evidence.title: Cryptomunt Icecat genoteerd aan Txbit exchange onder ICYticker
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous launch-period release identifying Txbit.io as a Netherlands-based exchange established in 2019.

evidence.title: Cryptocurrency Icecat listed on Txbit exchange under ICY ticker
evidence.notes: Independent institutional publication describing Txbit as founded in 2019 and located in the Netherlands.

evidence.title: The Txbit journey ends here. Txbit will be closing down on September 14th, 2023
evidence.notes: Primary operator announcement stating the closure decision, reasons, immediate trading shutdown, and withdrawal procedure.

evidence.title: Crypto exchange Txbit halts trading, announces permanent closure
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous independent report confirming the trading halt, permanent closure plan, and 2019 launch context.

evidence.title: Txbit Crypto Exchange to Close Services on September 14
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous report reproducing the operator's regulatory, compliance-cost, and market-pressure rationale.

evidence.title: The Txbit journey ends here. Txbit will be closing down on September 14th, 2023
evidence.notes: Primary source setting 12:00 UTC on 2023-09-14 as the final website and withdrawal deadline.

evidence.title: Crypto exchange Txbit to cease operations amid unfavourable market conditions
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous report confirming the September 14 closure and customer withdrawal deadline.

evidence.title: Txbit trade volume and market listings
evidence.notes: Exchange directory preserves the notice that trading was canceled on 2023-08-14 and all services terminated permanently on 2023-09-14.
